title: carduus × moritzii subsp. gillotii
intro: Carduus × moritzii subsp. gillotii, also known as the Spiny Plumeless Thistle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the thistle family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and sore throats. The health benefits of Carduus × moritzii subsp. gillotii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of menopause.
